The attacker has been edged towards the exit door at Old Trafford, and the Rossoneri are perhaps the club fighting hardest to sign him. arts.ttl: Manchester United close in on first January signing as Diego Leon flies in for medical
arts.sum: The left-back is set to finalise a deal which will see him join when he turns 18

arts.ttl: Man United boss Ruben Amorim faces major issue with Red Devils "very consistent at losing games" - Tomasz Kuszczak
arts.sum: Former Manchester United goalkeeper Tomasz Kuszczak tells Sports Mole that the Red Devils need to address their consistency problems in order to thrive under Ruben Amorim.

arts.ttl: I regret leaving Arsenal for Man Utd - I wanted to rip up contract straight away
arts.sum: After just one training session with Manchester United back in 2018, Alexis Sanchez was already contemplating tearing up his contract and yearning for a return to Arsenal. In his first season, a victorious FA Cup run coupled with netting an impressive 25 goals in various competitions earned him Arsenal's Player of the Year accolade.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Borussia Dortmund, Napoli 'serious contenders' for Red Devils attacker after fresh development
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund and Napoli are allegedly both firmly in the race to sign Manchester United attacker Marcus Rashford before the end of the month.

arts.ttl: Arsenal legend makes Man United transfer admission about Ruben Amorim’s squad
arts.sum: Nigel Winterburn has told Ruben Amorim that he need not worry about Premier League rivals poaching his current Manchester United squad given their performances this season

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Manchester United ‘sharks’ in Leiria last night – Benfica and Sporting transfers on agenda
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester United had officials at the Taça da Liga final on Saturday evening, as SL Benfica faced Sporting CP. The final was played at the Estádio Dr. Magalhães Pessoa in Leiria and after a 1-1 draw it went to penalties. Benfica ending up winning 7-6 and rightfully celebrated like they’d just won the World Cup. arts.sum: Barcelona are hopeful of making at least one signing this month, and Marcus Rashford is a player that is high on the agenda.
